mano_cua.result_summary: 任务列表复选框为圆形（非标准方形），选中项目会被移动到列表底部（严重bug），手动输入 - [ ] text 不会创建任务列表，已完成项无删除线
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Now I have a comprehensive view of the task list. Let me analyze the visual rendering in detail: Checkboxes display consistently (○ for unchecked, ✓ for checked). Items are evenly spaced vertically. Critical Bug: When a task list item is checked, it moves to the bottom of the list. Circular checkboxes instead of standard square. Raw Markdown - [ ] text not converted to task list block. No strikethrough for completed items.
